parameters.responseBody: ={ "success": false, "error": "Missing required fields: employee_name and employee_email are required" }

values.content: You are an expert HR onboarding specialist and copywriter. Generate warm, professional, personalized onboarding content for new employees. Always return valid JSON only — no markdown, no explanation.

parameters.subject: =Action Required: {{ $json.employee_name }} starts on {{ $json.start_date }} — Your Onboarding Checklist
parameters.message:
=

New Hire Manager Briefing

Hi {{ $json.manager_name }},

{{ $json.employee_name }} is joining your team as {{ $json.role }} on {{ $json.start_date }}. Here's your manager action list for their first week:

{{ $json.manager_briefing }}

Their Onboarding Checklist

    {{ $json.onboarding_checklist.map(t => '
  • ' + t + '
    • ').join('') }}

Buddy Suggestion

{{ $json.buddy_suggestion }}

First Week Goals for {{ $json.employee_name }}

    {{ $json.first_week_goals.map(g => '
  • ' + g + '
    • ').join('') }}

Best,
HR Team

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, employee: $json.employee_name, email: $json.employee_email, role: $json.role, department: $json.department, start_date: $json.start_date, emails_scheduled: ['Day 0 — Welcome', 'Day 7 — Check-In', 'Day 30 — Milestone'], slack_announced: true, manager_briefed: $json.manager_email ? true : false, checklist_items: $json.onboarding_checklist?.length || 0, timestamp: $json.timestamp }) }}
